def positive_business_rule_mixed_with_serialization_mapping():
    rule_id = "business_rule_mixed_with_serialization_mapping"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag functions that both enforce domain rules and convert to wire or storage payloads in the same block."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
